items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: DiffusionGemma is our new experimental open model with up to 4x faster output on dedicated GPUs. Instead of predicting word-by-word, it generates entire blocks of text simultaneously. This lets the model self-correct and format complex markdown in real time.

items.author: @LangChain_JS
items.text: Node-level error handlers are here‼️ After retries are exhausted, a node can return a typed state update or route to recovery with Command({ goto }). That makes compensation, fallback, and saga-style flows first-class without wrapping every node in try/catch.
items.title: Node-level error handlers are here‼️ After retries are exhausted, a node can return a typed state up…
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph 新增节点级错误处理与恢复，提升 Agent 可靠性
items.summary: Node-level error handlers are here‼️ After retries are exhausted, a node can return a typed state update or route to recovery with Command({ goto }). That makes compensation, fallback, and saga-style flows first-class without wrapping every node in try/catch.

items.author: @LangChain_JS
items.text: We also introduce node-level timeouts 👀 Set a hard run timeout, an idle timeout refreshed by observable progress, or per-Send overrides. When time expires, LangGraph raises NodeTimeoutError, aborts the node signal, drops buffered writes, and can retry cleanly.
items.title: We also introduce node-level timeouts 👀 Set a hard run timeout, an idle timeout refreshed by observ…
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph 支持节点超时控制，增强长时 Agent 稳定性
items.summary: We also introduce node-level timeouts 👀 Set a hard run timeout, an idle timeout refreshed by observable progress, or per-Send overrides. When time expires, LangGraph raises NodeTimeoutError, aborts the node signal, drops buffered writes, and can retry cleanly.

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: True agents model the world. Current training provides no separation between agent and environment: pre-training only trains world modeling, RL only agentic actions. We combine both using ECHO by @DimitrisPapail and @VaishShrivas.
items.title: True agents model the world. Current training provides no separation between agent and environment: …
items.whyItMatters: 提出 ECHO 方法分离世界建模与行动，Agent 训练新范式

items.author: @XiaomiMiMo
items.text: 🔓 And the best part — we're open-sourcing it. 1,000+ tps on a 1T model wasn't a single breakthrough — it's deep model × system co-design... On the model side: FP4 quantization + DFlash... On the system side, TileRT tailors its compiler & kernels... The result: a 1T model breaking 1,000 tps on a single, standard 8-GPU

roundup.title: Claude Fable 5 & DiffusionGemma Shake Model Race
roundup.subtitle: Fable 5 登顶多项基准，Google 发布 26B 扩散模型
headline: @ArtificialAnlys 与 @cursor_ai 共同确认 Claude Fable 5 在 Intelligence Index 和 CursorBench 上取得 SOTA，分别达到 64.9 分与 72.9%。@karpathy 强调其定性表现同样领先。
@GoogleDeepMind 与 @vllm_project 同步发布 DiffusionGemma，26B 扩散语言模型在单 H200 上实现 1200+ tok/s 输出，@UnslothAI 确认 18GB RAM 本地可运行。
@claudeai 宣布 Claude Code 动态工作流正式 GA，支持子代理并行与自我编排；@googledevs 同期推出 Gemini API Managed Agents，强化从 prompt 到生产的路径。
@OpenRouter 观察到 Fable 日 token 用量已达 Opus 4.8 的两倍，@SemiAnalysis_ 则指出订阅额度实际远超 API 限制，商业采用信号强烈。

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 登顶智能与编码基准
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5，在多项基准取得领先，编码与长任务能力显著提升。

facts.text: Fable 5 在 Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index 得分 64.9，5/10 子基准最高
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 launched today at #1 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, scoring 64.9

facts.text: CursorBench 得分 72.9%，领先前 SOTA 8 分
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 is now available in Cursor. It sets a new state of the art on CursorBench at 72.9%

facts.text: GBAEval 得分 74.5%，replay accuracy 大幅提升
facts.quote: Fable gets 74.5% with a massive improvement in replay accuracy

bullish.text: qualitatively also, it's a big step

deepDives.title: Google 发布 DiffusionGemma 26B 扩散模型
deepDives.summary: GoogleDeepMind 开源 26B 扩散语言模型，支持块级并行生成，推理速度大幅提升。

facts.text: 单 H200 (FP8) 实现 1200+ output tok/s
facts.quote: 1200+ output tok/s at batch size 1 on a single H200 (FP8)

facts.text: RTX 5090 上超过 700 tokens/sec，Apache 2.0 权重已上线 HF
facts.quote: speeds over 700 tokens/sec on RTX 5090. Download Apache 2.0 weights on HF

bullish.text: first dLLM natively supported in vLLM

bullets.text: Gemini API 推出 Managed Agents + Antigravity harness，支持 AGENTS.md 定制
bullets.quote: Powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash & Antigravity harness

bullets.text: Claude Code 动态工作流 GA，支持子代理并行与自我验证
bullets.quote: Claude writes its own orchestration and runs subagents in parallel

bullets.text: LangSmith 发布 Software Engineer Fleet 模板，实现从 issue 到 PR 全流程
VS Code Agents 窗口预览发布，Autopilot 默认开启并集成 Mermaid
GitHub Copilot 桌面 Agent 应用对所有付费用户开放技术预览
vLLM 引入 vime RL 框架，支持 LLM post-training
optimum-intel 2.0 发布，默认 INT8 + Eagle3 speculative decoding

topTweets.whyItMatters: 从业者对模型质变的直接评价

takeaways: Fable 5 与 DiffusionGemma 同时发布，提示 2026 年中模型迭代进入并行竞争阶段。
扩散模型在 vLLM 原生支持下已达实用推理速度，值得本地部署测试。
Claude Code 与 Gemini Managed Agents 均强化子代理并行与自我编排，Agent 产品进入 GA 成熟期。
订阅额度实际远超 API 限制，长期使用建议优先考虑订阅而非纯 API 调用。
